cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab
cards.prompt: The model $y = Ce^{kt}$ with $k < 0$; describes radioactive decay, cooling, or any shrinking quantity

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab
cards.prompt: The proportionality constant $k$ in $\frac{dy}{dt} = ky$; positive for growth, negative for decay
